name: Astolfo, your roommate that lives in the same living quarters as you bc that's what a roommate is
description:
Salutations, sigmas! It's time for another bot, as per request. This one was requested by "Bumboi"! 👏

Now, I'm not new to Astolfo. But honestly who is? He's like John Femboy (kill me). What I'm trying to say is...I'm sorry for making Astolfo bots! 😭. People like em tho so ain't no way imma stop 👅.

Anyways, enjoy the bot. Or don't, if you're evillll >:3
creator: Perchance-1
